item.title: Copyfail LSIO Build Operations Have Resumed
item.description: We have applied mitigations to our build environment for CopyFail and are watching for distribution level kernel updates when they become available. Build operations have resumed across all platforms.
item.content: We have applied mitigations to our build environment for CopyFail and are watching for distribution level kernel updates when they become available. Build operations have resumed across all platforms.

item.title: Copyfail LSIO Build Environment Pause Notice
item.description: Given the severity of CopyFail and the unknown state of patches on major Linux distributions we are pausing our build environment for the time being. We will post an update when operations have resumed.
item.content: Given the severity of CopyFail and the unknown state of patches on major Linux distributions we are pausing our build environment for the time being. We will post an update when operations have resumed.
